headerDisplay: Event-driven Homebridge plugin for Alarm.com-backed security systems (ADT Control, ADT Command, ADT+, Brinks, and others). Requires Python 3.13+ on your Homebridge host; the plugin auto-installs `pyalarmdotcomajax` in a private venv on first run.
footerDisplay: For 2FA setup, first sign in to Alarm.com's web portal and opt for device-based 2FA. The first time this plugin starts, it will prompt for a fresh 2FA code in the Homebridge log.

username.title: Alarm.com Username
username.description: Your Alarm.com (or ADT Control / ADT+) login email.

mfaCookie.title: 2FA Remember-Me Cookie (optional)
mfaCookie.description: If your account has 2FA enabled, paste the remember-me cookie from a successful pyalarmdotcomajax CLI login here. Leave blank if your account does not use 2FA.

exposeSecurityPanel.title: Expose Security Panel
exposeSecurityPanel.description: Exposes the alarm panel as a HomeKit Security System accessory.

armAwayKeypadBypass.title: Bypass open zones when arming Away
armAwayKeypadBypass.description: If enabled, faults are bypassed when Home app requests Arm Away. Leave off for most setups.

pythonPath.title: Python executable path (advanced)
pythonPath.description: Override the detected Python 3.13+ binary. Leave blank for auto-detect.
